meta.name: Single-VM node-ready
meta.description: Install Node.js 22.x and configure the Feria dev registry on the host VM.

steps.label: Install Node.js 22.x and configure Feria registry
steps.bash:
set -euo pipefail

if npm --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "npm already installed: $(npm --version)"
else
  apt-get update
  apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg
  curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  apt-get install -y nodejs
fi

# Configure Feria dev registry — point @lamalibre packages at the host gateway.
GATEWAY_IP="$(ip route | awk '/default/{print $3}')"
GATEWAY_IP="${GATEWAY_IP:-192.168.2.1}"
echo "@lamalibre:registry=http://${GATEWAY_IP}:4873" | tee /root/.npmrc /home/ubuntu/.npmrc
